app.title: The Royal Dispatch
app.subtitle: Your letters have arrived
app.error: {princess}'s letter is on its way — try again in a moment 💌

sorryMessages.elsa: Elsa got caught in a snowstorm in Arendelle... ❄️ Try again in a little while!
sorryMessages.belle: Belle is lost in her favourite book right now 📚 She'll be back soon!
sorryMessages.cinderella: Cinderella is at the royal ball tonight 👠 Try again in a moment!
sorryMessages.ariel: Ariel is swimming with the dolphins and can't come to the surface 🐠 Try again soon!
sorryMessages.rapunzel: Rapunzel's lanterns blew out in the wind 🌻 She'll light them again soon!
sorryMessages.moana: Moana is sailing beyond the reef right now 🌊 She'll be back soon!
sorryMessages.raya: Raya is on a mission across Kumandra 🐉 Try again in a little while!
sorryMessages.mirabel: Mirabel is fixing a crack in the casita 🦋 She'll be back soon!
sorryMessages.chase: Chase is on a rescue mission in Adventure Bay 🐕 Try again soon!
sorryMessages.marshall: Marshall tripped over his own paws again 🔥 He'll be back up soon!
sorryMessages.skye: Skye is flying through the clouds right now ✈️ She'll land soon!
sorryMessages.rubble: Rubble is building something amazing 🏗️ He'll be back soon!

onboarding.confirmRemoveBody: Remove {name}? Their saved memories will be deleted and past stories will be hidden.
onboarding.errExpired: Your link has expired. Type /register in Telegram for a new one.
onboarding.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
